meta.title: hypo.online — quick mortgage orientation in the Czech Republic
meta.description: Short questionnaire and basic orientation. Not a bank decision. Optional intro to a mortgage broker.

home.badge: Mortgage orientation for the Czech Republic
home.headline: See in a few minutes whether it is worth speaking with a mortgage specialist.
home.sub: This is not a bank approval — you get a brief orientation and can leave contact details for a broker.
home.trust1: We do not store your questionnaire answers after the result.
home.trust2: We only store name, email and phone if you request contact.
home.how1: You answer a few short questions.
home.how2: We show an indicative outcome and next step.
home.how3: Optionally you leave contact — a broker will reach out.

quiz.intent: What are you mainly looking for?
quiz.timeline: When do you roughly expect to draw the loan?
quiz.result_ok: For this profile, a consultation with a mortgage specialist is often worthwhile — banks differ and details matter.
quiz.result_review: Your combination often needs individual review (documentation, income stability, residency). A specialist can structure the next steps.
quiz.result_contactHint: We only save the fields below — not your questionnaire answers.
quiz.name: Name
quiz.disclaimer: This is not a loan offer or a bank decision. It is for orientation and broker handoff.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.p1: We process only what the service needs. Answers from the quick check are used only to compute your result and are not stored.
privacy.p2: If you submit contact details, they are used so a selected mortgage broker can reach you. Add full legal text with your counsel.
